---
title: "Getting started with zeitR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started with zeitR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
library(zeitR)
```

## Overview

**zeitR** is an R package for importing, parsing, and analysing raw actigraphy
data. It is designed to complement `slumbR` in the Circadia Lab ecosystem and
provides a tidy, pipeline-friendly interface for common rest-activity analyses.

## Installation

```r
# Install from GitHub (development version)
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("circadia-bio/zeitR")
```

## Basic usage

*This vignette will be expanded as functions are added.*
